case_title: FRANCISCO ANCHETA ET AL VS. ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PLEASE SEE CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD. NO DATE WRITTEN AS DATE RECEIVED. NO DATE STAMP FROM THE POST OFFICE. SERVED APR-09-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY ANCHETA, FRANCISCO ANCHETA, JEJE R AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHETA, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO ANCHETA AND JEJE R ANCHETTA ARE PRESENT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANCHETA, FRANCISCO ANCHETA, JEJE R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
